nodes.name: Acoustic radiation.l
nodes.label: Acoustic radiation
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral thalamocortical leg (medial geniculate to Heschl's gyrus); the auditory pathway is already bilaterally distributed in the brainstem.

nodes.name: Acoustic radiation.r
nodes.label: Acoustic radiation
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral thalamocortical leg (medial geniculate to Heschl's gyrus); the auditory pathway is already bilaterally distributed in the brainstem.

nodes.name: Anterior thalamic radiation.l
nodes.label: Anterior thalamic radiation
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral thalamocortical projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Anterior thalamic radiation.r
nodes.label: Anterior thalamic radiation
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral thalamocortical projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Arcuate fasciculus.l
nodes.label: Arcuate fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract (arching from temporal to frontal cortex); does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Arcuate fasciculus.r
nodes.label: Arcuate fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract (arching from temporal to frontal cortex); does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle anterior part).l
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle anterior part)

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle anterior part).r
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle anterior part)

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle posterior part).l
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle posterior part)

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle posterior part).r
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Middle posterior part)

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Posterior dorsal part).l
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Posterior dorsal part)

nodes.name: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Posterior dorsal part).r
nodes.label: Cingulate gyrus and sulcus (Posterior dorsal part)

nodes.name: Corticobulbar tract.l
nodes.label: Corticobulbar tract
nodes.decussation: Bilateral: fibres cross near each brainstem motor nucleus, so most cranial-nerve motor nuclei receive both hemispheres (lower face and tongue are mainly contralateral).

nodes.name: Corticobulbar tract.r
nodes.label: Corticobulbar tract
nodes.decussation: Bilateral: fibres cross near each brainstem motor nucleus, so most cranial-nerve motor nuclei receive both hemispheres (lower face and tongue are mainly contralateral).

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (frontal).l
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (frontal)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; the relayed pontocerebellar fibres then cross the midline in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (frontal).r
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (frontal)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; the relayed pontocerebellar fibres then cross the midline in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (occipital).l
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (occipital)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; relayed pontocerebellar fibres cross in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (occipital).r
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (occipital)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; relayed pontocerebellar fibres cross in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (parietal).l
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (parietal)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; relayed pontocerebellar fibres cross in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticopontine tract (parietal).r
nodes.label: Corticopontine tract (parietal)
nodes.decussation: Descends ipsilaterally to the pontine nuclei; relayed pontocerebellar fibres cross in the middle cerebellar peduncle.

nodes.name: Corticospinal tract.l
nodes.label: Corticospinal tract
nodes.decussation: Pyramidal decussation in the caudal medulla; ~85-90% of fibres cross to form the lateral corticospinal tract, the rest descend as the anterior corticospinal tract and cross segmentally.

nodes.name: Corticospinal tract.r
nodes.label: Corticospinal tract
nodes.decussation: Pyramidal decussation in the caudal medulla; ~85-90% of fibres cross to form the lateral corticospinal tract, the rest descend as the anterior corticospinal tract and cross segmentally.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (anterior).l
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (anterior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (anterior).r
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (anterior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (posterior).l
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (posterior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (posterior).r
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (posterior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (superior).l
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (superior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Corticostriatal tract (superior).r
nodes.label: Corticostriatal tract (superior)
nodes.decussation: Ipsilateral corticostriatal projection; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Dentatorubrothalamic tract.l
nodes.label: Dentatorubrothalamic tract
nodes.decussation: Crosses at the decussation of the superior cerebellar peduncle (caudal midbrain) to reach the contralateral red nucleus and thalamus - the principal cerebellar output to the cortex.

nodes.name: Dentatorubrothalamic tract.r
nodes.label: Dentatorubrothalamic tract
nodes.decussation: Crosses at the decussation of the superior cerebellar peduncle (caudal midbrain) to reach the contralateral red nucleus and thalamus - the principal cerebellar output to the cortex.

nodes.name: Frontal aslant tract.l
nodes.label: Frontal aslant tract
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Frontal aslant tract.r
nodes.label: Frontal aslant tract
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Inferior cerebellar peduncle.l
nodes.label: Inferior cerebellar peduncle
nodes.decussation: Mixed: olivocerebellar fibres are crossed, while the posterior spinocerebellar input is largely uncrossed.

nodes.name: Inferior cerebellar peduncle.r
nodes.label: Inferior cerebellar peduncle
nodes.decussation: Mixed: olivocerebellar fibres are crossed, while the posterior spinocerebellar input is largely uncrossed.

nodes.name: Inferior fronto-occipital fasciculus.l
nodes.label: Inferior fronto-occipital fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Inferior fronto-occipital fasciculus.r
nodes.label: Inferior fronto-occipital fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Inferior longitudinal fasciculus.l
nodes.label: Inferior longitudinal fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Inferior longitudinal fasciculus.r
nodes.label: Inferior longitudinal fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.label: Insula (Subcentral gyrus and ant. and post. sulci)

nodes.name: Medial lemniscus.l
nodes.label: Medial lemniscus
nodes.decussation: Carries already-crossed fibres: the sensory (internal arcuate) decussation is in the caudal medulla, so the lemniscus is contralateral to its dorsal-column origin.

nodes.name: Medial lemniscus.r
nodes.label: Medial lemniscus
nodes.decussation: Carries already-crossed fibres: the sensory (internal arcuate) decussation is in the caudal medulla, so the lemniscus is contralateral to its dorsal-column origin.

nodes.name: Medial pontine branches of basilar artery.l
nodes.label: Medial pontine branches of basilar artery

nodes.name: Medial pontine branches of basilar artery.r
nodes.label: Medial pontine branches of basilar artery

nodes.name: Middle cerebellar peduncle
nodes.label: Middle cerebellar peduncle
nodes.decussation: Carries pontocerebellar fibres that have already crossed the midline in the pons, linking each pontine nucleus to the contralateral cerebellar hemisphere.

nodes.name: Middle longitudinal fasciculus.l
nodes.label: Middle longitudinal fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Middle longitudinal fasciculus.r
nodes.label: Middle longitudinal fasciculus
nodes.decussation: Intrahemispheric association tract; does not cross the midline.

nodes.name: Optic radiation.l
nodes.label: Optic radiation
nodes.decussation: Post-chiasmal: the hemidecussation is at the optic chiasm, upstream of this tract, so each radiation carries the contralateral visual hemifield.

nodes.name: Optic radiation.r
nodes.label: Optic radiation
nodes.decussation: Post-chiasmal: the hemidecussation is at the optic chiasm, upstream of this tract, so each radiation carries the contralateral visual hemifield.

nodes.name: Reticulospinal tract.l
nodes.label: Reticulospinal tract
nodes.decussation: Medial (pontine) reticulospinal fibres descend largely uncrossed; the lateral (medullary) component projects bilaterally.

nodes.name: Reticulospinal tract.r
nodes.label: Reticulospinal tract
nodes.decussation: Medial (pontine) reticulospinal fibres descend largely uncrossed; the lateral (medullary) component projects bilaterally.

nodes.name: Superior cerebellar peduncle
nodes.label: Superior cerebellar peduncle
nodes.decussation: Its efferent fibres cross at the decussation of the superior cerebellar peduncle in the caudal midbrain.
